name: modoo
description: Vercel: copies research/ static site to out/ for deployment

scripts.build: rm -rf out && mkdir -p out && cp research/index.html research/analytics.html research/insight.html research/methodology.html research/startup_ideas_report_v2.html out/ && cp research/vercel.json out/ && cp -R research/static out/static && cp -R research/data out/data
